summary: Comprehensive testing of March 22 punch list features. All 17 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All March 22 punch list features verified working. Key verifications: (1) Landing page: horizontal scroll for challenges, $1,250/$5,000 pricing, Become a Sponsor is text-only with email link, Choose Your Route CTA visible. (2) Walker dashboard: Karibuni greeting (not Habari). (3) Team page: Leave Team button has subtle/ghost styling. (4) Supporter dashboard: Total pledged $450, MaryMoves pledge shows $400 (200km x $2/km full route), JohnnySteps pledge shows $50. (5) Admin: No Inquiries tab, Stats by Challenge table visible, Users tab has delete buttons for non-admin users, Challenges tab has route map upload and milestone photo upload. (6) Onboarding: Photo upload section in Walker Type step, Achievement levels as informational table, Invite+Share merged in Step 3, 3 default supporter invite rows. (7) Fundraising: Buttons are normal width (not full width), redirect to /supporter-dashboard after pledge.

landing_page.become_sponsor_text_only: PASS - No form, email link present

walker_dashboard.karibuni_greeting: PASS - Karibuni found, Habari not present

admin_panel.stats_by_challenge: PASS - Table visible with walkers, teams, pledged
admin_panel.users_delete_buttons: PASS - 26 delete buttons for non-admin users

onboarding_page.photo_upload: PASS - Optional photo upload in Walker Type step

fundraising_page.normal_width_buttons: PASS - px-12/px-10 mx-auto block (not full width)

api_endpoints.fundraising_user_mary: PASS - total_raised reflects full route pledge amounts
